notableEvents.label: Spencer Horwitz pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Horwitz homers (2) on a fly ball to right field.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Umpire reviewed (tag play), call on the field was upheld: Konnor Griffin steals (4) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Spencer Horwitz pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Horwitz grounds out, second baseman Richie Palacios to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Konnor Griffin to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Jake Mangum singles on a bunt ground ball to pitcher Shane McClanahan. Jake Mangum to 2nd. Jake Mangum advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by pitcher Shane McClanahan.
